PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(h|cpp)$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ ^build/ ]]; then CLANG_FORMAT="/c/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Community/VC/Tools/Llvm/x64/bin/clang-format.exe"; if [ -x "$CLANG_FORMAT" ]; then "$CLANG_FORMAT" -i "$FILE"; fi; fi'
